name: Pork Steaks with Peppers
recipeInstructions:
Pork Steaks should be cut 1/2 inch thick. There should be 4 to 5 of them.
There should be 3 Med Peppers (Red, Green, Yellow) and they should be cut into thin strips.
Choose one of the following soup mixes to use in the recipe: Onion, onion-Mushroom or Beefy Mushroom.
In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Brown steaks until browned on all sides, about 4-5 minutes per side. Remove steaks from skillet and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium. Add peppers and garlic to the same skillet. Cook for 5 minutes or until peppers are crisp tender.
Stir in tomato. Add soup mix blended with water, thyme, and pepper. Bring mixture to a boil.
Return steaks to the skillet. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until steaks and vegetables are tender, about 25 minutes.
